title: RUSTINS Quick Dry MDF Sealer - Professional Sealant for Rapid Results 500ml
features: Rapid Sealing Power: Rustins Quick Dry MDF Sealer ensures swift and efficient sealing of MDF surfaces, saving you time on your projects; Achieve professional results without the wait
Enhanced Durability: Our advanced formula not only seals but also reinforces MDF, providing long-lasting protection against moisture, stains, and wear. Elevate the lifespan of your MDF creations

Seamless Application: The user-friendly design allows for easy application, making it a perfect choice for DIY enthusiasts and professionals alike; Enhance your workflow and project efficiency; ADD TO CART now for instant benefits

Versatile Compatibility: Ideal for a variety of MDF applications, including furniture, cabinets, and more; Rustins Quick Dry MDF Sealer adapts to your creative needs, ensuring a reliable finish on every project
Trusted Brand: Rustins, a name synonymous with quality, presents a quick-drying MDF sealer that meets the highest standards
Trust in a brand that delivers superior performance for your sealing requirements
description: From the manufacturer Rustins Quick Drying MDF Clear A quick drying, clear sealer that allows the application of both paints or varnishes, unlike white MDF sealers which can only be painted. Touch dry in 30 minutes and can be re-coated in 2 hours. Clean brushes in water. Water based & quick drying Overcoat with paint or varnish For all grades of MDF Available in 250ml, 500ml, 1L, 2.5L, About Us In 1924 Sidney Rustin opened his first shop in London's Shoreditch district where he sold wood finishing products to local residents and trades people. Sidney's father was a cabinetmaker and his mother funded the business venture. During the second world war the first night raid destroyed the original 1932 factory and the business moved to its present location in Cricklewood, London.
